recommendations.title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do America
recommendations.overview: Slacker duo Beavis and Butt-Head wake to discover their TV has been stolen. Their search for a new one takes them on a clueless adventure across America, during which they manage to accidentally become America's most wanted.

recommendations.title: Idiocracy
recommendations.overview: To test its top-secret Human Hibernation Project, the Pentagon picks the most average Americans it can find - an Army private and a prostitute - and sends them to the year 2505 after a series of freak events. But when they arrive, they find a civiliz

recommendations.title: Extract
recommendations.overview: The owner of a factory that produces flavor extracts, Joel Reynold seems to have it all, but really doesn't. What's missing is sexual attention from his wife, Suzie. Joel hatches a convoluted plan to get Suzie to cheat on him, thereby clearing the wa

recommendations.title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do the Universe
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In 1998, Beavis and Butt-Head are sentenced to Space Camp by a “creative” judge. Their obsession with a docking simulator (huh huh) leads to a trip on the Space Shuttle, with predictably disastrous results. After going through a black hole, they re-e

recommendations.title: The Docks of New York
recommendations.overview: A blue-collar worker on New York's depressed waterfront finds his life changed after he saves a woman attempting suicide.

recommendations.title: Bedazzled
recommendations.overview: A hapless loser sells his soul to the Devil in exchange for seven wishes, but has trouble winning over the girl of his dreams.

recommendations.title: Lady and the Tramp
recommendations.overview: The love story between a pampered Cocker Spaniel named Lady and a streetwise mongrel named Tramp. Lady finds herself out on the street after her owners have a baby and is saved from a pack by Tramp, who tries to show her to live her life footloose an

recommendations.title: Them Who?
recommendations.overview: David loses his white collar job, his fiancée and his house after one night with con man Marcello. He tracks him down to exact revenge, but ends up becoming his disciple in order to win back everything.

recommendations.title: Expedition Happiness
recommendations.overview: A German couple and their dog travel across North America in a school bus searching for a state of pure bliss.

recommendations.title: The One and Only Ivan
recommendations.overview: A gorilla named Ivan who’s living in a suburban shopping mall tries to piece together his past, with the help of other animals, as they hatch a plan to escape from captivity.
